title: skip_string_b doesn't validate surrogates or control chars
description: Inconsistent validation between extract_field (char path, json_skip_string) and extract_path (byte path, skip_string_b). Lone high surrogate \uD800 in a skipped field passes through skip_string_b without error; the same input through json_skip_string returns DecodeFailed. Bare control chars (< 0x20) in skipped strings also pass through skip_string_b silently. Code comments claim invalid JSON is rejected regardless of which field is targeted — that claim is only true for the char-level path. Maintenance consequence: any contributor who writes tests against extract_field semantics won't notice extract_path is looser; future fix attempts will break one path.
